creator: amdmi3@amdmi3.ru
text:
* Nicola Vitale (nivit@FreeBSD.org) wrote:

> > [2008/3/17, Dmitry Marakasov <amdmi3@amdmi3.ru>]
> >  When trying to view the lyrics, sonata says: "ZSI not found, fetching
> >  lyrics support disabled.", but ZSI option in sonata port is enabled and
> >  py25-zsi is installed.
> I think you have to replace net/py-zsi with net/py-zsi-devel for lyrics support.
Thanks, but it's still unable to fetch any lyrics (tried with many many
songs). But I realize it may be not the ports problem, it which case the
PR may be closed I guess.

--
